repository.name: red-run
repository.description: Offensive security toolkit for Claude Code

commit.message:
Fix orchestrator: always run host discovery on shell access, including DCs

The orchestrator previously routed DCs exclusively to ad-discovery,
skipping host-level enumeration entirely. This missed additional NICs
(critical for pivoting), Hyper-V infrastructure, scheduled tasks with
stored creds, and local privilege escalation vectors.

Now: host discovery (windows-discovery/linux-discovery) runs on ALL
hosts when shell access is gained. On DCs, ad-discovery runs additionally
after host discovery completes. Sequential, not either/or.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Offensive security toolkit for Claude Code

commit.message:
Dashboard: only show active agents, auto-remove completed

Active agents are detected by output file mtime (60s threshold).
Completed agents are automatically removed from the dashboard.
Completed agents remain accessible via the agent browser (b key).
If no agents are active, the dashboard sits idle until one spawns.

Add agent browser, double-tap dismiss, and operator approval rule

Dashboard:
- Add agent browser (b key) — lists all agent transcripts from the
  session sorted by recency, with skill/agent-type labels extracted
  from JSONL content. Agents already in the dashboard shown with ●
  marker. Enter to add, Esc/b to close.
- Double-tap dismiss (d key) — first press shows "tap d again to
  dismiss" warning in yellow, second press within 2s actually removes
  the pane. Prevents accidental dismissals.
- Fix tasks directory path derivation in dashboard.sh — sed was
  stripping a leading dash that the actual directory keeps.
- Label extraction: detect Plan/Explore agents from prompt keywords,
  extract skill names from "Load skill" patterns, fall back to prompt
  summary instead of hex agent IDs.

Orchestrator:
- Add mandatory operator approval rule before every agent spawn.
  Presented as a top-level constraint alongside "don't run scanning
  tools". No agents launch without explicit operator sign-off.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

feat: fix citation dots pipeline to read from Statements V2 tables (#1708)

The citation dot overlays were completely dark in production because
buildCitationQuotesBundle() still read from the old citationQuotes table
while all new data is written to statement_citations/statementPageReferences.

- Add GET /api/statements/citation-dots/all endpoint that joins
  statementPageReferences → statements → statementCitations → resources
  and returns data grouped by page slug, mapping statement verdicts to
  AccuracyVerdict values (verified→accurate, disputed→inaccurate, etc.)
- Add buildStatementCitationDots() in build-data.mjs that fetches from
  the new endpoint and stores results as database.statementCitationDots
- Add statementCitationDots field to DatabaseShape and getStatementCitationDots()
  getter in data/index.ts
- Add getStatementCitationQuotes(pageId, referenceMap) in citation-data.ts
  that bridges footnoteResourceId strings to numeric footnote numbers via
  the referenceMap produced by renderMdxPage()
- Merge statement quotes with legacy quotes in page.tsx; statement data
  takes precedence for any footnote it covers, legacy fills the rest

Closes #1598

feat(cli): add viewport-height, max-width, and device-scale-factor flags (#86)

Adds three new flags to `export` and one to `render` for full dimensional
control over all export formats:

- `export --viewport-height <px>` (default 1024): Playwright viewport height
  for PDF layout phase and block screenshots
- `export --max-width <css>` (default '64rem'): CSS max-width on #glyph-root;
  pass 'none' to fill the full viewport width
- `export --device-scale-factor <factor>` (default 2): HiDPI scale for block
  screenshots in `export md`
- `render --viewport-height <px>` (default 800): viewport height for block
  screenshot capture

Also fixes a stale assertion in @glyphjs/schemas registry test (29 → 32)
left over from the layout components commit.

commit.message:
raise large contract threshold from 500KB to 3MB

500KB was too low — scanned PDFs can exceed that at only 4 pages.
3MB is a more reliable indicator of a genuinely long contract (30+ pages).

commit.message:
fix: exclude migration-artifact editLogs from dangling reference count (#1703)

The integrity check in fetchIntegritySummary() was counting edit_logs
and citation_quotes with page_id_int IS NULL as dangling references.
But records from before the Phase D / Phase 4a migration have
page_id_old (text) populated and page_id_int NULL — these are
migration artifacts, not data corruption.

Fix: only flag records where BOTH page_id_old AND page_id_int are NULL
(truly orphaned). This eliminates ~54 false positives from the System
Health dashboard (E927), restoring trust in its integrity counts.

Closes #1615

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 完成 Epic 9 管理后台系统

- 新增 StatsService 提供仪表盘统计、收入图表、用户增长图表、热门游戏数据
- 新增 AdminHandler 处理管理员 API: 统计、用户管理(列表/改角色/封禁/解封/删除)、评论审核

- 路由注册所有 /api/v1/admin/* 端点
- main.go 注入 StatsService

前端:
- admin/page.tsx: 修正字段对齐后端 API, 展示今日/累计统计, 热门游戏, 快捷导航
- admin/users/page.tsx: 修正用户 ID 为 UUID string, 支持封禁/解封/改角色操作
